name: feishu-doc
description: Feishu/Lark document API integration with 15 operations covering the full document lifecycle: read, write, append, create, get/update/delete blocks, create tables, write table cells, upload images/files. Block-level granularity for enterprise document automation.
review: High-quality Feishu/Lark document skill from the trusted openclaw monorepo. 15-action API design covers full document lifecycle with complete JSON examples for every operation. Edge cases (owner_open_id, image scaling, markdown table limitations) well-documented. Feishu enterprise use cases are underserved in current catalog.
